Payment Gateway Setup

Configure LemonSqueezy (card) and Cryptomus (crypto) integrations

Webhook URLs — Copy these into your provider dashboards
LemonSqueezy Webhook:
Cryptomus Webhook:
Lemon Squeezy
Card payments via Lemon Squeezy
Variant IDs (from Lemon Squeezy product variants)
Cryptomus
Crypto payments via Cryptomus
App URL (required for webhooks)
Used as the base for Cryptomus webhook callback URL
Setup Instructions
🍋 LemonSqueezy
  1. Go to app.lemonsqueezy.com → Settings → API
  2. Create an API key and paste it above
  3. Copy your Store ID from the store page URL
  4. Create 3 products (Starter $4.99, Pro $19.99, Business $59.99)
  5. Copy each product's Variant ID from the variant URL
  6. Go to Webhooks → Add webhook → paste the URL above
  7. Check order_created event, generate a secret, paste it above
₿ Cryptomus
  1. Go to cryptomus.com → Dashboard → Merchant
  2. Create a merchant and copy the Merchant UUID
  3. Go to Settings → Payment API
  4. Generate a Payment API Key and paste above
  5. Set your App URL (e.g. your Replit .app domain)
  6. Cryptomus webhook is auto-configured via the callback URL

API Settings

Configure the Timestamps.video API key used for generating chapter timestamps

Current API Status
API Key Source
checking…
Base URL Source
checking…
Timestamps.video API
api.timestamps.video — AI chapter generation
Get your key at timestamps.video → Dashboard → API Keys
Default: https://api.timestamps.video — only change if using a custom deployment
How to get your Timestamps.video API Key
  1. Go to timestamps.video and sign in or create an account
  2. Navigate to the Dashboard → API Keys section
  3. Click "Create new key" and give it a name (e.g. TimestampAI App)
  4. Copy the generated key (it starts with ts_) and paste it above
  5. Click "Save API Settings", then "Test Connection" to verify
  6. Once connected, your users can generate AI timestamps using your account credits

Email Setup

Configure SMTP to send welcome emails, payment receipts, and credit notifications

Automated Emails — What Gets Sent
👋
Welcome Email
On first timestamp generation
✅
Payment Receipt
After successful purchase
⚡
Credit Update
When admin adjusts credits
📬
Contact Form
Forwarded to admin email
SMTP Configuration
Works with Hostinger, Gmail, any SMTP provider
Hostinger: smtp.hostinger.com
Hostinger: 465 (SSL) or 587 (TLS)
The email address you created in Hostinger (e.g. noreply@timestampai.app)
Sender Info
Leave blank to use the Username above
Send Test Email
Verify everything is working by sending yourself a test
Hostinger Email Setup Guide
  1. Log in to Hostinger hPanel → go to Emails → Email Accounts
  2. Click "Create Email Account" — e.g. noreply@timestampai.app
  3. Set a strong password and note it down — you'll paste it above
  4. SMTP Host: smtp.hostinger.com · Port: 465 · SSL: On
  5. Enter the email and password in the fields above, then click "Save Settings"
  6. Click "Test Connection" to verify, then "Send Test" to check delivery
